description: A rider schedules a trip to the airport for the next day. The system must dispatch a driver at the appropriate time.

nodes.task_description: A rider books a trip for a future time and date.

expected_outcome.value: The scheduled ride is logged in the system.

nodes.task_description: Shortly before the scheduled pickup time, the system offers the trip to nearby drivers.

expected_outcome.value: The trip request is sent out to eligible drivers.

nodes.task_description: A driver accepts the scheduled trip.

expected_outcome.value: The trip is assigned to a specific driver.

nodes.task_description: The system instructs the driver to head towards the pickup location to arrive at the scheduled time.

expected_outcome.value: The driver is dispatched to ensure an on-time pickup.
